name: template_2
code:
local DataStoreService = game:GetService("DataStoreService")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local STORE = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("{{DATASTORE_NAME}}")
local PREFIX = "{{KEY_PREFIX}}"
local cache = {}
local function load(p)
	local key = PREFIX .. p.UserId
	local ok, data = pcall(function() return STORE:GetAsync(key) end)
	cache[p.UserId] = (ok and type(data) == "table") and data or {}
end
local function save(p)
	local key = PREFIX .. p.UserId
	pcall(function() STORE:SetAsync(key, cache[p.UserId] or {}) end)
end
Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(load)
Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(save)
game:BindToClose(function()
	for _, p in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do save(p) end
end)
-- Read/write: cache[player.UserId].YourKey = value
